'''Triogor Sllus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] who was a pilot-candidate within the [[New Republic Starfighter Corps/Legends|New Republic Starfighter Corps]]. With his career already in jeopardy, Sllus agreed to transfer into the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]/[[Commando/Legends|commando]] squadron that [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] was putting together. Some time during the initial training and culling process that the candidates went through, he lashed out and physically struck the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] and fellow candidate [[Jesmin Ackbar]], the niece of [[Admiral of the Fleet/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]]. For this action he was washed out of the squadron two days later and, presumably, Starfighter Command altogether.
